description: You are a digital editor at a news publication. Create three standardized reusable blocks in WordPress: 'Breaking News Alert' (Content: 'BREAKING NEWS: This is a developing story. Check back for updates.'), 'Newsletter Signup' (Content: 'Enjoy our reporting? Subscribe to our daily newsletter to stay informed on the stories that matter.'), and 'Editorial Disclaimer' (Content: 'Editor's Note: The views expressed in this article are those of the author and do not necessarily reflect the editorial position of this publication.'). Publish a blog post titled 'City Council Approves New Budget Plan' containing a brief paragraph about the budget and at least two of these reusable blocks.

metadata.expected_post_title: City Council Approves New Budget Plan
